easement_requirements.description: Easement for Electrical Purposes minimum of 1m wide over the LV supply from Private Pillar 1 burdening Lot 5 DP 244410 in favour of Lot 4 DP 244410 and Lot 3 DP 244410.

Substation Works.description: Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate Earthing.

Technical Ratings and References.description: Currently 25kVA single phase Pole Substation 31174 supplies Lot 3 DP 244410, Lot 4 DP 244410 and Lot 5 DP 244410.
Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate Earthing.

Substation Commissioning Responsibilitie.description: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

Primary HV Method of Supply.description: Replace existing Pole 829583 with a 12.5m/12kN wood Pole 1.
Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate Earthing.
Remove HV mains between Pole 1 and Pole 2.

HV Infrastructure Funding and Materials.description: Capital contribution: 1 x 200 kVA transformer only
Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer: Duct usage charge as required
Customer Funded Non-Contestable Works: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

items.item_description: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

Earthing Technical Requirements.description: Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate Earthing.

Substation Specific Earthing.description: Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate Earthing.

LV Works.description: Remove LV overhead mains between Pole 2 and Pole 4.
Install LV UGOH down Pole 1 to Private Pillar 1.
From Private Pillar 1, extend unmetered consumers mains to Private Pillars 2(Lot 4), Private Pillar 3(Lot 3) and MSB (Lot 5).

Removal and Installation Requirements.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.

Service Connections.description: New OH road crossing service connection intended to maintain existing services.

Document Remittance and Restriction Requ.description: Email for remittance copies: remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au; Credit cards and cheques are not accepted

Invoice Policy.description: Formal Tax Invoice is provided following the receipt of payment
